deep_dive.title: ELSAA: Efficient Low-Rank and Sparse Attention Approximation for Training Transformers
deep_dive.abstract: The quadratic $N\times N$ attention score matrix remains a central obstacle to extending Transformers to longer input lengths. Existing efficient attention methods usually reduce this bottleneck by either imposing sparsity, so that each query attends to only a small subset of keys, or by using low-rank/kernel sketches, so that global interactions are compressed into a lower-dimensional representation. We propose \emph{ELSAA}, an efficient low-rank and sparse approximation of attention. Importantly, ELSAA does \emph{not} decompose the learned projection or output matrices of the Transformer into sparse and low-rank factors. Instead, after dense projections produce $Q,K,V$, ELSAA approximates the induced attention score operator itself: a sparse branch captures selected high-similarity interactions, while a low-rank branch summarizes diffuse global interactions. Since the two branches can be normalized over supports with very different denominator mass, ELSAA introduces a denominator-aware fusion term that scales the sparse branch according to its estimated attention mass relative to the low-rank branch. This gives a practical framework for constructing low-rank and sparse attention outputs without materializing the full quadratic score matrix, aiming to enable longer-context training while preserving both sharp token-level interactions and broad contextual mixing.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: efficient low-rank and sparse attention approximation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 高效低秩稀疏注意力近似
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 高效低秩稀疏注意力近似
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 高效低秩稀疏注意力近似
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes ELSAA, an efficient approximation of attention via low-rank and sparsity, reducing quadratic complexity without decomposing projection matrices.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对Transformer注意力二次复杂度问题，提出ELSAA方法，通过低秩和稀疏近似直接逼近注意力得分矩阵，而非分解投影矩阵。ELSAA在保持模型性能的同时显著降低计算和内存开销，使Transformer能处理更长序列。该方法作为一种通用的高效注意力机制，可应用于需要可扩展注意力的多智能体系统。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对Transformer注意力二次复杂度问题，提出ELSAA方法，通过低秩和稀疏近似直接逼近注意力得分矩阵，而非分解投影矩阵。ELSAA在保持模型性能的同时显著降低计算和内存开销，使Transformer能处理更长序列。该方法作为一种通用的高效注意力机制，可应用于需要可扩展注意力的多智能体系统。

deep_dive.title: Defer to Plan: Adaptive Multi-Agent Fusion for End-to-End V2X Driving
deep_dive.abstract: Vehicle-to-everything-aided autonomous driving (V2X-AD) significantly enhances driving performance through information sharing. However, existing collaborative perception methods only optimize module-level perception capabilities and fail to effectively serve the ultimate planning and control tasks. We propose an end-to-end collaborative driving system that directly optimizes planning task performance. The system employs MotionNetwork to fuse historical temporal information, utilizes attention mechanisms to efficiently compress spatial features into compact tokens, and adaptively fuses multi-agent features through an autoregressive decoder. Additionally, we introduce Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to enhance the model's representation capacity for heterogeneous features. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves a driving score of 79.72, surpassing the state-of-the-art CoDriving baseline (77.15) by 3.33% in closed-loop evaluation while maintaining communication efficiency.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: end-to-end V2X driving with attention for multi-agent fusion
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 端到端V2X驾驶利用注意力进行多智能体融合
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 端到端V2X驾驶利用注意力进行多智能体融合
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 端到端V2X驾驶利用注意力进行多智能体融合
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an end-to-end collaborative driving system using attention mechanisms for multi-agent feature fusion and MoE for enhanced representation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出端到端协同驾驶系统，直接优化规划任务。系统使用MotionNetwork融合历史信息，借助注意力机制将空间特征压缩为紧凑token，通过自回归解码器自适应融合多智能体特征，并引入混合专家架构增强表示能力。该方法将多智能体协作与注意力机制深度融合，在V2X驾驶任务上取得最优规划性能。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出端到端协同驾驶系统，直接优化规划任务。系统使用MotionNetwork融合历史信息，借助注意力机制将空间特征压缩为紧凑token，通过自回归解码器自适应融合多智能体特征，并引入混合专家架构增强表示能力。该方法将多智能体协作与注意力机制深度融合，在V2X驾驶任务上取得最优规划性能。

deep_dive.title: Dreamer-CPC: Message Learning with World Models for Decentralized Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
deep_dive.abstract: In multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), inter-agent communication is effective for improving performance under partial observability. Representation learning-based approaches enable decentralized agents to learn messages grounded in their own observations, but they rely only on current observations and cannot convey information accumulated over time. We propose Dreamer-CPC, a decentralized model-based MARL method that integrates message learning based on Collective Predictive Coding (CPC) into the world model of DreamerV3. Each agent independently maintains a world model and a message module, and infers and exchanges messages from the latent states of the world model that reflect the history of past observations and actions. We evaluated Dreamer-CPC in two environments: Observer, a non-cooperative information-sharing task, and CatchApple, a newly introduced task in which task-relevant observations are temporarily missing. In both environments, Dreamer-CPC outperformed IPPO-CPC, an existing CPC-based method that generates messages from current observations, as well as no-communication baselines. In particular, in CatchApple, Dreamer-CPC achieved 4 to 5 times the episode return of IPPO-CPC, demonstrating effective coordination where other methods fail due to missing observations. These results suggest that communication grounded in the latent dynamics of world models can support decentralized decision-making when current observations alone are insufficient.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning, inter-agent communication, world models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 去中心化多智能体强化学习，智能体间通信，世界模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 去中心化多智能体强化学习，智能体间通信，世界模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 去中心化多智能体强化学习，智能体间通信，世界模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Dreamer-CPC integrates collective predictive coding into world models for decentralized multi-agent learning, enabling agents to exchange messages grounded in latent state history.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 在多智能体强化学习中，基于表征学习的通信方法往往只依赖当前观测，无法传递历史累积信息。本文提出Dreamer-CPC，将集体预测编码融入DreamerV3的世界模型，每个智能体独立维护世界模型和消息模块，通过潜在状态交换历史信息，在部分可观测环境下显著提升了协作性能。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 在多智能体强化学习中，基于表征学习的通信方法往往只依赖当前观测，无法传递历史累积信息。本文提出Dreamer-CPC，将集体预测编码融入DreamerV3的世界模型，每个智能体独立维护世界模型和消息模块，通过潜在状态交换历史信息，在部分可观测环境下显著提升了协作性能。
